---
title: "Teaching"
---

```{=html}
<div class="bib-stats">
  <div class="bib-stat">
    <div class="bib-label">Credits</div>
    <div class="bib-number" data-target="22" data-decimals="0">0</div>
  </div>
  <div class="bib-stat">
    <div class="bib-label">Enrolled</div>
    <div class="bib-number" data-target="488" data-decimals="0">0</div>
  </div>
  <div class="bib-stat">
    <div class="bib-label">Evaluation</div>
    <div class="bib-number" data-target="4.6" data-decimals="1">0.0</div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const counters = document.querySelectorAll('.bib-number');
  const duration = 1000;

  counters.forEach(function (el) {
    const target = parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-target'));
    const decimals = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals') || '0', 10);
    const start = performance.now();

    function step(now) {
      const elapsed = now - start;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
      el.textContent = (eased * target).toFixed(decimals);
      if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(step);
  });
});
</script>
```

## Shih Chien University

**English Taught Program in International Business**

:::::::: paper-entry
::: hex-col
![](hex/stat.svg){fig-alt="Statistics course hex logo"}
:::

::: paper-title
**Statistics I & II**
:::

::: paper-meta
Undergraduate, Fall, 2024, 2025; Spring, 2025, 2026.
:::

::: paper-desc
A two-semester introduction to statistical reasoning, covering descriptive statistics, probability, and inference through hypothesis testing, regression, and ANOVA. Each week pairs a concept lecture with a hands-on lab session.
:::

::: paper-links
[Course site](https://yyliou.github.io/stat){.paper-btn}
:::
::::::::

:::::::: paper-entry
::: hex-col
![](hex/pa.svg){fig-alt="Programming for Applications course hex logo"}
:::

::: paper-title
**Programming for Applications**
:::

::: paper-meta
Undergraduate, Spring, 2024, 2025, 2026.
:::

::: paper-desc
An introduction to programming fundamentals in R, emphasizing how to translate practical business and data problems into working code through weekly in-class exercises.
:::

::: paper-links
[Course site](https://yyliou.github.io/pa){.paper-btn}
:::
::::::::

:::::::: paper-entry
::: hex-col
![](hex/da.svg){fig-alt="Data Analysis course hex logo"}
:::

::: paper-title
**Data Analysis**
:::

::: paper-meta
Undergraduate, Fall, 2024, 2025.
:::

::: paper-desc
Practical data analysis and communication in the modern R ecosystem, centered on the grammar of graphics and data visualization with `ggplot2`, turning analytical findings into clear visual narratives.
:::

::: paper-links
[Course site](https://yyliou.github.io/da){.paper-btn}
:::
::::::::

## National Taiwan University

**Department of Agricultural Economics — Teaching Assistant**

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Quantitative Method**
:::

::: paper-meta
Spring 2020 (Prof. Chang).
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Agricultural Regulations**
:::

::: paper-meta
Spring 2022 (Prof. Chen).
:::
:::::

::::: paper-entry
::: paper-title
**Agricultural Policy and Performance Evaluation**
:::

::: paper-meta
Spring 2024, Fall 2026 (Prof. Chang).
:::
:::::
